narrative.description: Namco's maze classic tasks players with eating every dot while evading four color-coded ghosts whose AI personalities create emergent chase tension across 256 increasingly frantic boards.
narrative.core_loop: Clear all dots in the maze, use power pellets to turn the tables on ghosts, grab fruit bonuses, and survive escalating speed increases.

mechanics.map_notes: Single-screen maze chase optimized for high-score routing and ghost avoidance.
mechanics.expression: Single-screen maze chase optimized for high-score routing and ghost avoidance.

mechanics.map_notes: Ghost mode shifts between scatter, chase, and frightened states with readable behavior.
mechanics.expression: Ghost mode shifts between scatter, chase, and frightened states with readable behavior.

mechanics.map_notes: Three lives per credit with extra lives at point thresholds.
mechanics.expression: Three lives per credit with extra lives at point thresholds.

mechanics.map_notes: Power pellets temporarily allow ghost consumption for bonus points.
mechanics.expression: Power pellets temporarily allow ghost consumption for bonus points.

mechanics.map_notes: Fruit bonuses and ghost combos reward optimal pellet timing.
mechanics.expression: Fruit bonuses and ghost combos reward optimal pellet timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Maze corridors constrain escape routes during ghost swarms.
mechanics.expression: Maze corridors constrain escape routes during ghost swarms.

mechanics.map_notes: One hit from a ghost costs a life unless powered up.
mechanics.expression: One hit from a ghost costs a life unless powered up.

mechanics.map_notes: Each maze completion advances to the next board layout.
mechanics.expression: Each maze completion advances to the next board layout.

mechanics.map_notes: Ghosts converge from four directions creating emergent bullet-hell-like pressure.
mechanics.expression: Ghosts converge from four directions creating emergent bullet-hell-like pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: No attack input; power mode is the offensive state change.
mechanics.expression: No attack input; power mode is the offensive state change.

mechanics.map_notes: Ghost and Pac-Man speed increase as more dots are consumed.
mechanics.expression: Ghost and Pac-Man speed increase as more dots are consumed.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Pac-Man through its core arcade loop.
